Sandbox_ProjectHoomans.NPCZombieWoundCha: Base chance that a zombie lunge creates a wound. Armor on the struck body part reduces the final chance; failed rolls are parried.
Sandbox_ProjectHoomans.NPCZombieBiteChan: Chance that a successful zombie wound is a bite.
Sandbox_ProjectHoomans.NPCZombieLacerati: Chance that a successful non-bite result becomes a laceration; remaining wounds are scratches.
Sandbox_ProjectHoomans.NPCZombieInfectio: Allows bites to infect NPCs, cause terminal infection, and reanimate the corpse as an ordinary zombie.
Sandbox_ProjectHoomans.NPCInfectionMorta: In-game hours between an infected bite and death.
Sandbox_ProjectHoomans.NPCReanimationHou: In-game hours between infection death and corpse reanimation.
Sandbox_ProjectHoomans.EnableWeaponDamag: Uses each NPC's equipped weapon damage and combat skill. Disable to use legacy combat-profile damage values.
Sandbox_ProjectHoomans.NPCDamageDealtMul: Scales weapon-based damage dealt by PNC NPCs. 1.0 is normal and 0 prevents weapon-based damage.
Sandbox_ProjectHoomans.NPCPlayerWounds_t: Allows PNC NPC attacks to cause pain, scratches, and bleeding on players in addition to overall health loss.
Sandbox_ProjectHoomans.NPCAmmoConsumptio: Requires ranged PNC NPCs to carry the firearm's ammunition in their virtual inventory and consumes one round per resolved shot.
Sandbox_ProjectHoomans.NPCWeaponConditio: Allows equipped PNC NPC weapons to lose virtual condition when attacks hit.
